description: Gate rubric the guardian scores a testing-qa deliverable against. Status vocabulary: pass | fail | not-verified. Never green-as-success without evidence.

dimensions.label: Routing integrity
criteria: Exactly one topic resolved and one playbook Read (never 2+ to compare)
Disambiguation rule applied explicitly (bdd-vs-e2e, load-vs-e2e, coverage-default)

dimensions.label: Target and boundary
criteria: Concrete artifact named (repo path, route, URL, or FR/SC spec)
No hypothetical test run; gap report when no runnable target
Assertion pushed to the cheapest layer that catches the bug

dimensions.label: Discover-Analyze-Execute-Validate
criteria: Validate step actually run, not skipped
Thresholds derived from baseline/standard (CrUX p75, >=80% diff), not guessed

dimensions.label: Evidence and script-first
criteria: Every non-obvious claim carries one tag from a single family
Pass/fail rests on actual command output, not prose
not-verified used when a script could not run (never upgraded to pass)

dimensions.label: Governance
criteria: Green is not asserted as success without evidence
Flake quarantined with owner+SLA, never retried into green
No client PII, no invented prices, single brand

fail_conditions: Completed claim on an unrun Validate step
Green CI asserted as success with weak/absent assertions or lab-green-field-fail
Threshold cited without a baseline or standard source
